blog1.title: How to Structure a PT PMA for Foreign Direct Investment in Indonesia
blog1.excerpt: A complete guide to establishing a PT PMA: ownership rules, minimum capital requirements, OSS licensing, KBLI classification, and the step-by-step establishment process for foreign investors.
blog1.author: Ijlal Falih Dwianto
blog2.title: M&A Due Diligence Best Practices in Southeast Asia
blog2.excerpt: A comprehensive overview of due diligence frameworks tailored to the legal, regulatory, and cultural complexities of Southeast Asian M&A transactions.
blog2.author: Ijlal Falih Dwianto
blog3.title: Cross-Border Investment Outlook: Indonesia 2025
blog3.excerpt: An analysis of FDI trends, regulatory reforms, and sector opportunities shaping Indonesia's investment landscape in 2025 and beyond.
blog3.author: Ijlal Falih Dwianto
blog4.title: Legal & Financial Compliance for Foreign-Owned Companies in Indonesia
blog4.excerpt: An overview of the key ongoing legal and financial compliance obligations for PT PMA companies — from LKPM reporting to employment law requirements.
blog4.author: Ijlal Falih Dwianto
blog5.title: Capital Structuring Strategies for Indonesian Market Entry
blog5.excerpt: How foreign investors should think about capital structure, debt vs. equity, and tax-efficient profit repatriation when entering the Indonesian market.
blog5.author: Ijlal Falih Dwianto
blog6.title: Corporate Governance in Cross-Border M&A Transactions
blog6.excerpt: A framework for evaluating and remediating corporate governance risks in Indonesian M&A targets — from board structure to related-party transaction management.
blog6.author: Ijlal Falih Dwianto
